title: QUANTUM Phone Reveal
description: Reveals phone numbers from Israeli real estate listings using browser automation

listings.title: Listings
listings.description: Array of listings to process. Each must have: id, url, source.

url.title: URL
url.description: Direct URL to the listing page

sourceListingId.title: Source Listing ID
sourceListingId.description: Original ID on the source site

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of browser pages running in parallel

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Apify proxy settings for residential proxies
